title: StargateSurpreme
description:
This modpack was created to replace MUSIC only on minecraft, for a better playing experience. Lets face it minecraft music can get boring and some music can be annoying.

Includes music from the Stargate Series, music from Free Stock Music!
body:
![Stargate Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f588c27cd12a49d4ecab9a7e20786bdbc451e0.webp)

![Overview Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9da7c0ab254885b6f57c6ee25dcbc1b5383a3fd6.webp)
This modpack was created to replace MUSIC only on minecraft, for a better playing experience. Lets face it minecraft music can get boring and some music can be annoying.

Includes music from the Stargate Series, music from Free Stock Music, along with some sounds from Doctor Who Series.
![Socials Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7cccb9597b2a4b7dbff3983221ac5786ca3a37b.webp)


Partnered with [BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/stargate)!

BisectHosting offers quick, simple, and high-quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use.
Use the code "stargate" to get 25% off your first month as a new client for any of their gaming servers.
![Sponsor Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8214a3d9fcd1bef865533336409cb025076e995.jpeg)
